en_title: Call of Duty: Black Ops 1 and 2 Are Officially Being Ported to New Platforms Next Month
cn_title: 《使命召唤：黑色行动1与2》将于7月登陆新平台
subtitle: 经典回归，三模式齐全
opus_summary: Treyarch确认《黑色行动1&2》7月由Iron Galaxy移植至PS，含战役、多人、僵尸模式。具体PS版本、进度继承及跨平台未明。系列罕见移植。

paragraphs.en: Call of Duty: Black Ops 1 and 2 are being brought to new platforms in July, courtesy of Iron Galaxy.
paragraphs.cn: 《使命召唤：黑色行动1》和《黑色行动2》将于7月移植到新平台，由Iron Galaxy负责。

paragraphs.en: Treyarch confirmed today that its beloved Call of Duty games are making a grand return via new ports, courtesy of Tony Hawk's Pro Skater 3 + 4 developer Iron Galaxy. These ports will only be available on PlayStation, though it's unclear which PlayStation platforms. The initial leak for these ports indicated they'd likely be available on PS4 and, as a result, would also be available to play on PS5 through backwards compatibility. It's currently unclear if PS5 will get native ports.
paragraphs.cn: Treyarch今日确认，这两款备受喜爱的《使命召唤》游戏将通过全新移植版盛大回归，负责移植的正是《托尼·霍克职业滑板3+4》的开发商Iron Galaxy。这些移植版仅在PlayStation上发售，但具体是哪些PlayStation平台尚不明确。此前关于这些移植版的泄露信息显示，它们很可能会登陆PS4，并通过向下兼容功能在PS5上游玩。目前尚不清楚是否会推出PS5原生版本。

paragraphs.en: Treyarch also confirmed that the ports will include campaign, multiplayer, and Zombies, so players will get to experience the full packages. It's not known if players will be able to carry over their progress, if cross-play will be enabled with other versions, or if these ports will simply live in isolation.
paragraphs.cn: Treyarch还确认，这些移植版将包含战役、多人模式和僵尸模式，因此玩家可以体验完整内容。目前尚不知晓玩家是否可以继承进度、是否支持与其他版本的跨平台联机，亦或这些移植版是否将各自独立运行。

paragraphs.en: While Treyarch made no mention of any upgrades coming to Xbox or PC, keep in mind both of these games are readily available on those platforms already. Both Black Ops games have been available on Xbox for years thanks to the platform's far more extensive backwards compatibility environment, but there's no native support for PS3 titles on PS4 or PS5. Either way, it's exciting news and somewhat unexpected since Call of Duty has largely steered clear of re-releases over the years.
paragraphs.cn: 尽管Treyarch并未提及Xbox或PC版是否会获得任何升级，但要知道这两款游戏在这些平台上已经可以直接游玩了。得益于Xbox更为广泛的向下兼容环境，两款《黑色行动》游戏多年来一直可在Xbox上游玩，但PS4或PS5则没有对PS3游戏的原生支持。无论如何，这都是个令人兴奋的消息，而且多少有些出人意料，因为《使命召唤》多年来在很大程度上一直回避重制发行。

paragraphs.en: Call of Duty 4: Modern Warfare was remastered in 2016 and was a huge hit, but it also took focus away from Call of Duty: Infinite Warfare. A remaster of Modern Warfare 2's campaign followed in 2020, but fans were upset that the game's iconic multiplayer mode was left on the cutting room floor.
paragraphs.cn: 《使命召唤4：现代战争》曾在2016年重制并大获成功，但也因此分走了《使命召唤：无限战争》的关注度。2020年，《现代战争2》也推出了战役重制版，但粉丝对于该作标志性的多人模式被砍而忿忿不平。

paragraphs.en: Fans have speculated that Activision has avoided such projects since, as it can split the player base of newer Call of Duty games.
paragraphs.cn: 粉丝们猜测，此后动视一直回避这类项目，因为重制可能会分流新《使命召唤》的玩家群体。

paragraphs.en: Cade Onder is a freelancer for IGN's news team. He covers all things entertainment, including gaming, film, and more. You can find him on Twitter @Cade_Onder.
paragraphs.cn: Cade Onder是IGN新闻团队的撰稿人。他报道游戏、电影等各类娱乐资讯。你可以在推特上找到他 @Cade_Onder。
